title: Editing Photos
drDigitalIntro: Photos lets you edit photos without a separate app. Double-click a photo to open the editor. You can crop (change the size or angle), rotate, adjust brightness and contrast, and apply filters. All edits are non-destructive — the original is always saved. Undo changes anytime. Photos editing is perfect for quick adjustments before sharing.

playgroundTask.question: What does 'non-destructive editing' mean in Photos?

options.text: You can't make permanent changes to photos
Edits are permanent and cannot be undone
The original photo is always preserved — you can revert anytime
Only one edit can be applied at a time

drDigitalSuccess: Non-destructive means safe to experiment! You can always click 'Revert to Original' to undo everything.
drDigitalHint: 'Non-destructive' = not destroying anything. The original is always safe underneath.
